title: EIA Submissions and Decisions – 2025
body: "Projects subject to an EIA process under the 2020 EIA Regulations are listed below. Further information on the individual projects EIA and the decision status can be accessed by selecting the relevant link below. The link for each project will only be made accessible on receipt of the public notice as set out in regulation 11(8).     Project Title Developer Year Submitted OPRED Ref Public Consultation Started Under Review/Determined   Fotla Field Development Ithaca Oil and Gas Limited 2025 ES/2024/018 Yes Under Review    "
